conventions.units: ms for *_ms; gain = unfused/fused (>1 => fusion faster)
conventions.best_unfused_ms: min(eager mm+add, vendor mm + compiled-add clean variant)
conventions.measured_gain_verified: best_unfused / best VERIFIED-fused (addmm iff profiler shows no separate add kernel + numerics; compiled/nocg/forced iff template- or vendor-fused per evidence + numerics; custom triton fused iff numerics)
conventions.needs_custom_kernel: False iff a STOCK path (addmm/compiled/nocg/forced) is verified-fused
conventions.custom_gain_*: custom-vs-custom within one Triton tiling family (Round-4 lesson): best-vs-best and same-tile (unfused GEMM forced onto the fused kernel's tile)
conventions.timing: median of 30 cuda events after 15 warmup + clock warmer; drift probe = bare vendor mm re-measured at config END
conventions.numerics: rel-vs-fp32 <= max(2*eager_rel, 5e-2) on a min(M,4096)-row slice

env.clocks_note: clocks LOCKED 1500/5501 by host; ClockSampler per config
env.sweep: core-full + light rest (host decision): all 6 paths on 5K x M in {2048,8192,32768}; light rows skip the whole-fn compile variants (null with reason)
env.M_131072_dropped: x_act[131072,24576] bf16 = 6.4 GB alone > 8 GB; covered by the per-K M-independence assertion (M in {512,8192,32768})

addmm_primary.note: PRIMARY vendor-framing metric added at analysis: addmm_gain = best_unfused_ms / addmm_ms (same vendor library both sides). measured_gain_verified admits the forced Triton template, which at M=32768 K>=16384 beats cuBLAS itself by 16-19% (a GEMM-quality inversion, not residual-fusion benefit) and inflates those rows.
